creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213165
py-django-tastypie-0.14.3.patch

Hi,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-django-tasty-pie to 0.14.3 and assigns it to Django 2.2 (current LTS release) as Django 1.11 is End-of-Life since April 2020.

Changes to the port:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
- Sync RUN_DEPENDS with setup.py

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64 for each py35, py36, py37 and py38 flavor) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
